subcodes.first_line: The Book revealed in truth unto her who was illumined by the lights of the Sun of the remembrance of the Name of the Most Merciful, and who hath turned unto God, the Mighty, the Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق للتی اضائت بانوار شمس ذکر اسم الرحمن و اقبلت الی الله العزیز الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
